Professional Mobile Detailing · Independence & Manchester, IA

Our Services

Every service performed on-location at your home. Prices vary by vehicle size and condition.

Exterior Wash

A thorough hand wash that goes far beyond a drive-through car wash. Every panel hand washed, wheels and tires cleaned and dressed, windows streak-free, and door jambs wiped down. Our Wash + Wax package includes a professional clay bar decontamination treatment followed by a spray wax for up to 2–3 months of paint protection.

Exterior WashFrom $80
Exterior Wash + WaxFrom $130
Learn More
Before After

Interior Detail

A deep, comprehensive clean of every surface inside your vehicle. We vacuum every crevice, clean and condition all surfaces, detail the dash and door panels, clean all vents, and eliminate odors. Full carpet and seat shampoo with stain removal included. Dog hair, kids' messes, years of buildup — we handle it all.

Interior DetailFrom $175
Learn More
Before After

Full Detail

The complete inside and out package. Combines our full interior detail — including carpet and seat shampoo with stain removal — with a thorough exterior hand wash. Everything cleaned top to bottom for one great price. Our most popular service.

Best Value
Full DetailFrom $235
Learn More

Paint Correction

Remove swirl marks, fine scratches, water spots, and oxidation using professional machine polishing. The result is dramatically clearer, deeper, more reflective paint. One-step for mild issues, two-step for more severe defects.

One-Step CorrectionFrom $499
Two-Step CorrectionFrom $699
Learn More

Ceramic Coating

The most advanced paint protection available. Bonds to your clear coat and creates a durable hydrophobic barrier that repels water, dirt, and contaminants. Keeps your car cleaner longer and protects from UV damage for years.

Ceramic CoatingFrom $300
Learn More
